```python
def solve(*args):
    import sys
    from PIL import Image
    import os

    input_data = sys.stdin.read().strip().splitlines()
    output_images = []

    for line in input_data:
        params = line.split(',')
        if len(params) < 3:
            continue
        
        input_image_path = params[0].strip()
        target_width = int(params[1].strip())
        target_height = int(params[2].strip())
        focal_point = params[3].strip() if len(params) > 3 else None
        
        # Open the input image
        with Image.open(input_image_path) as img:
            img = img.convert("RGB")
            original_width, original_height = img.size
            
            # Resize logic
            if focal_point == "face_centric":
                # Placeholder for face-centric cropping logic
                img = img.resize((target_width, target_height), Image.ANTIALIAS)
            elif focal_point == "product_centric":
                # Placeholder for product-centric cropping logic
                img = img.resize((target_width, target_height), Image.ANTIALIAS)
            else:
                # Default resizing
                img = img.resize((target_width, target_height), Image.ANTIALIAS)

            # Save the output image
            output_image_name = f"output_image_{target_width}x{target_height}.jpg"
            img.save(output_image_name)
            output_images.append(output_image_name)

    # Output the names of the generated images
    for output_image in output_images:
        print(output_image)
```
